component.name: fifine Control Deck
component.summary: Control a Stream Dock style macro keypad

description.p: A native Linux control application for the fifine Control Deck — a Mirabox / Hotspot "Stream Dock" style macro keypad with per-key LCDs (USB 3142:0060).

Draw icons and labels on the keys and bind them to actions: launch apps, send hotkeys, type text, media and volume control, run scripts, brightness, page and profile switching, folders and multi-step macros — via a PyQt6 configuration GUI.

screenshot.caption: Actions catalog, the live key grid, and the key-settings panel
Editing a key: icon, colours, label and the assigned action

description.p: Folders, multi-action editor, production hardening; amd64 + arm64.
